name: Cauliflower Cheese Souffle
recipeInstructions:
1. Steam the chopped cauliflower above water until tender, slightly cool, chop fine, and set aside.
2. Melt butter in a saucepan.
3. Stir in flour over low heat, cook and stir for a couple of minutes or until golden brown.
4. Remove from heat and stir in milk, beating with a wire whisk to make very smooth.
5. Return to heat and bring to a quick boil, then reduce heat to simmer.
6. Add cheese and salt. Cook for 3 to 4 minutes or until thickened, stirring constantly; remove from heat.
7. Separate eggs and beat yolks, adding the white sauce slowly.
8. Stir in the Gouda cheese and cauliflower mixture.
9. Beat egg whites until stiff.
10. Fold into the mixture and spoon into a greased 2-quart souffle dish.
11. Bake in a pan of hot water in a preheated 375-degree oven for 35 to 40 minutes.
12. Serve immediately.
Makes 4 to 5 servings.
